description: Capabilities granted to the main window — explicit allowlist of every Tauri command (TASK-028). New commands MUST be added here to be invokable from the renderer; Tauri 2 fails closed. Sec-review H2 (Phase 4 wave 3) added the scoped plugin permissions for the Tauri Updater, Autostart, and Process plugins so the renderer can drive Settings → Updates + Tray menu without an over-broad `*:default` grant.
